summary: I reviewed this iteration's Define-phase artifacts and repository state for the "Human in the Loop Pause" task. The current phase (clarifying-questions-writer, codebase-explorer, requirements-writer, guide-alignment-critic) produced only documentation files under `.pipeliner/` (requirements.md, open_questions.md, discovery_notes.md) — no source code, migrations, or config changes were made. `git status` confirmed only this step's own `input.json` was modified, so there was nothing runnable to build, test, or lint. Per the safety rule (and since this repo is the live control plane with a shared dev database), I did not run any test/db commands and instead wrote `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/test-critic/verdict.json` with verdict `not_applicable` and no findings.
